title: Analytics - Software Language Change
scenario: DFU analytics event with language change does not display all required Firebase parameters (Success, Device Name, Firmware Update Status, version details, Language ID/Name, progress, update time, Error Description) after triggering a language change on a Poly device
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and ensure a compatible Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
3. Tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
4. Initiate a Device Firmware Update (DFU) that includes a software language change (e.g., via the firmware update mechanism in the app).
5. Wait for the DFU process to complete, including the language change on the device.
6. Open Firebase Analytics and navigate to the event page for the DFU-related analytics event.
7. Verify that the event page displays the default elements: graph, events in last 30 minutes, event count by country/gender, events per session, app version, app build, and app environment.

8. Verify that the event page also displays the additional parameters: Success, Device Name, Firmware Update Status, Current/Target Headset Version, Current/Target Charge Case Version, Current/Target Charge Stand Version, Current/Target Language ID, Target Language Name, Headset/Charge Case/Charge Stand Progress, Headset/Charge Case/Charge Stand Update Time in Seconds, and Error Description.
9. After a few hours, check the event count for the related elements in Firebase Analytics to confirm the count has increased.
expected: Firebase Analytics event page displays all default elements and additional parameters (Success, Device Name, Firmware Update Status, Current/Target Headset Version, Current/Target Charge Case Version, Current/Target Charge Stand Version, Current/Target Language ID, Target Language Name, Headset/Charge Case/Charge Stand Progress, Headset/Charge Case/Charge Stand Update Time in Seconds, Error Description). Event count for related elements increases after a few hours.
